metadata.description: Local marketplace for Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: agentwright
plugins.description: Chained audit pipelines with a spawned auditor and in-session verification/fixes

plugins.name: timewright
plugins.description: Single-slot undo for Claude's in-session changes, covering Bash-driven mutations that native /rewind misses

plugins.name: ideawright
plugins.description: Auto-surfaces novel, code-only product opportunities by mining public pain-point signals and verifying novelty
